- docs/audit/stage4_closure_ledger.md:34:  - ARZPLUS_HTTP_403 invalid token responses on wallet balance endpoint
- docs/audit/stage4_closure_ledger.md:38:  - balance parser failure due to missing _parse_wallet_balance_response_v2
- docs/handoff/phase10_post_freeze_local_hardening_handoff.md:192:- also confirms that override alone does **not** produce effective live activation because the prior offline-mode safety layer still enforces no-trade behavior
- docs/handoff/phase10_post_freeze_local_hardening_handoff.md:240:- final runtime posture remained no-trade
- docs/handoff/phase10_post_freeze_local_hardening_handoff.md:387:- the older offline-mode guard still enforces a deeper no-trade boundary
- docs/roadmap/EXCLUDED_TEST_AUDIT.md:42:- Does the test remain safe when no real wallet access is available?
- docs/roadmap/EXCLUDED_TEST_AUDIT.md:156:- uses local dummy wallet/bot test doubles
- docs/roadmap/EXCLUDED_TEST_AUDIT.md:160:- checks disabled-wallet accounting contract
- docs/roadmap/EXCLUDED_TEST_AUDIT.md:179:This test is deterministic, local-only, and meaningfully protects reporting summary behavior without introducing exchange/runtime risk.
- docs/roadmap/PHASE7_HARDENING_INDEX.md:15:This document does not authorize runtime-risky changes.
- docs/roadmap/PHASE7_HARDENING_INDEX.md:25:- veto conditions can force a non-entry / non-trade outcome
- docs/roadmap/PHASE7_HARDENING_INDEX.md:37:- hard-stop behavior should occur before unsafe trade path activation
- docs/roadmap/PHASE8_PHASE9_CHECKPOINT_MANIFEST.md:110:- wallet/balance/position reconciliation correctness under runtime stress
- docs/roadmap/PHASE8_PROGRESS.md:6:- Added an operator safe runbook for wallet setup, pre-run checks, expected HTTP 403 behavior, and incident handling.
- docs/roadmap/PHASE8_RECOVERY_ACCEPTANCE.md:58:- It introduces ambiguous behavior under exchange failure, HTTP 403, missing data, or wallet refresh errors.
- docs/roadmap/PHASE8_RECOVERY_TOUCHPOINTS.md:23:- No changes to order placement, wallet refresh, or trade execution behavior.
- docs/roadmap/PHASE8_RECOVERY_TOUCHPOINTS.md:43:- Infinite retry risk must be explicitly ruled out.
- docs/roadmap/PHASE8_RECOVERY_TOUCHPOINTS.md:50:- No-trade enforcement logic
- docs/roadmap/PHASE8_RECOVERY_TOUCHPOINTS.md:96:- Recovery must not hide balance or wallet refresh failures.
- docs/roadmap/PHASE8_RECOVERY_TOUCHPOINTS.md:104:- State assumptions immediately before or after trade-related decisions

## Phase 13 Integration Policy

- This map is documentation-only.
- No execution behavior is changed by this commit.
- No live trading, wallet movement, key handling, or production execution is introduced.
- Any future enforcement hook must preserve the Phase 12 GovernanceDecision contract.
- Any future enforcement hook must be covered by tests before merge.
